title: TextInput Change
description: Capture and store user input from a TextInput component using a state variable and the onChangeText prop.
problemStatement:
User entry! Create an `<input>` using the `TextInput` component. Link it to a state `text` using the `onChangeText` prop (which directly provides the new string).

**Requirement:** Display the current `text` value in a `Text` tag below the input.
hints: In React Native, `onChangeText` is a convenience prop that gives you the raw string directly.
expectedOutput: A text box where typing updates a live preview label below it
